description: A customer wants to downgrade from the 'Enterprise' plan to the 'Pro' plan to save costs.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and their current plan.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the customer is on the 'Enterprise' plan.

nodes.task_description: Explain which features the customer will lose by downgrading (e.g., SSO, advanced security).

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the impact of the downgrade.

nodes.task_description: Process the plan downgrade, effective at the next renewal date.
